title: Skill Discovery, Trigger Descriptions, and Boundaries · Protocol Clinic: Positive Cases
summary: Make explicit and implicit invocation reliable without false positives. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext positive cases increment in a trigger evaluation dataset. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write diverse prompts that should activate the skill.
Front-load use cases and trigger terms in a concise skill description.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Positive Cases evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-positive-cases-eekgsc: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Positive Cases into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-positive-cases-eekgsc:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
